qa_pairs.question: What was the title of the presentation at CANHEIT 2019 on June 20, 2019?
qa_pairs.answer: The presentation was titled "Providing A Unified User Environment for Canada’s National Advanced Computing Centers".

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find more information about the "Providing A Unified User Environment for Canada’s National Advanced Computing Centers" presentation from CANHEIT 2019?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find more information at `https://guidebook.com/g/canheitarc2019/#/session/23411098`.

qa_pairs.question: What is the title of the article published on July 28, 2019, in the Proceedings of the Practice and Experience in Advanced Research Computing '19?
qa_pairs.answer: The article is titled "Providing a Unified Software Environment for Canada’s National Advanced Computing Centers".

qa_pairs.question: Where can I access the full article "Providing a Unified Software Environment for Canada’s National Advanced Computing Centers" from the PEARC '19 proceedings?
Is a PDF version available for the article "Providing a Unified Software Environment for Canada’s National Advanced Computing Centers" from PEARC '19, and if so, where?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, a PDF version is available here: `https://ssl.linklings.net/conferences/pearc/pearc19_program/views/includes/files/pap139s3-file1.pdf`.
